summary: Complete comprehensive testing of Geo/Radar module with Telegram Bot alerts - All systems operational at 100% success rate
passed_tests: All 34 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
GET /api/geo/health - geo module health check operational
GET /api/geo/summary?use_llm=true - AI summary in Ukrainian working perfectly with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
GET /api/geo/stats/full - full statistics with top places, hourly/weekday distribution working
GET /api/geo/predict - predictions endpoint returning predictions with confidence levels
GET /api/geo/radar?lat=50.45&lng=30.52&radius=1000 - radar with distanceMeters, isInsideRadius fields functional
POST /api/geo/alerts/subscribe - alert subscription system working for Telegram integration
Frontend map view renders correctly with OpenStreetMap tiles
Frontend radar mode toggle functional (Радар ON/OFF button)
Frontend shows virus 🦠 and trash 🗑️ icons only as specified
Frontend statistics view displays event distribution with charts
View toggle buttons (Карта, Список, Статистика) fully functional
All sidebar components (MARKERS, AI SUMMARY, TOP PLACES) render correctly
Location button (Знайти мене) and fullscreen functionality working
All UI text properly displayed in Ukrainian language
Alert scheduler and bot polling systems configured and ready
AI Summary using GPT-4o via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY working correctly
No JavaScript errors or console errors found during testing
